text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Matikanefukukitaru and I are heading to a
shrine to officially welcome the new year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At least, that was the plan. She hasn't shown up,
so I decide to go by myself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So you have finally shown yourself, O honorable
Trainer. Shall I grant thy wishes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today, I don the posture of the gods. Why, you
ask? Because I am the chosen one blessed by
fortune. Oh-hohoho. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Her performance in the Kikuka Sho may have
gone to her head a bit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
New Year's is a prime time for celebration, and it
looks like the festive atmosphere brings out some
pretty bad habits.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, what are you going to wish for? It's perfectly
fine to follow your heart's desires.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think I'll wish for...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You wish to partake together? A wise choice.
Let's get right to it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woo! There's no better way to kick off the new
year than with a mega-lucky meat feast, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That one's cooked and ready to eat, Trainer. Just
remember to thank the gods first before you dig
in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's stamina increases as a result
of me treating her to barbecue. Is this the wish
paying off?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So you would like to improve in all areas? Then,
there's only one place to go...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The karaoke booth, of course! Let's start this new
year off on a high note with some high notes of
our own!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, my favorite group's got a new song out.
Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After giving a high-energy performance,
Matikanefukukitaru's physical abilities improve
across the board.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So you want more skills? I've got just the thing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's do a shrine maiden dance! I've always
wanted to give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trying a new dance every once in a while could be
a good learning experience.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, the bay at Takasago! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I don't think that's a shrine maiden dance. But it looks like she's added a few moves to her repertoire.
